description_long: This street food stall features a rectangular wooden frame with a flat tabletop surface for displaying goods. The stall is topped with a red-and-white striped canopy, providing shade and a classic market appearance. On the counter, various food items are arranged, including green vegetables, carrots, red produce, and yellow blocks that resemble cheese or packaged goods, as well as some hexagonal containers. The structure is supported by four wooden legs, with cross-bracing for stability, and the canopy is held up by two vertical posts. The food is openly displayed on the counter, making it easily accessible to customers. The overall design is simple, functional, and reminiscent of traditional open-air market stalls.
description: A wooden street food stall with a red-and-white striped canopy and an open counter displaying assorted foods and containers. The stall has a classic market look with visible produce and sturdy wooden supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped canopy, full display of food items including vegetables and blocks, and the open counter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stall, the canopy's overhang, and a partial view of the food items.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the food arrangement, including green vegetables, carrots, and red produce, as well as the back of the canopy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cross-bracing of the legs, the edge of the counter, and a partial view of the food items.
attribute_serving_counter: A flat, rectangular wooden counter that spans the width of the stall, used for displaying and serving food items. The counter is open and accessible from the front.
attribute_food_display: Food is openly displayed on the counter in an accessible arrangement, with no protective covers or display cases, allowing for easy viewing and selection.
attribute_architectural_style: traditional market stall with striped canopy
